title: Euphonic Sessions with Kyau & Albert - February 2019
description:
01 Mike Saint-Jules pres. MSJ - Sunrise Over Saturn [Euphonic Visions]
02 Bryn Liedl - Forgotten Fields [Euphonic]
03 Monolink - Father Ocean (Ben Boehmer Remix) [Embassy One]
04 Moonwalk - Galactic [Stil Vor Talent]
05 Binary Finary - 1998 (Dosem Remix) [Armada]
06 Cressida & Cabriolet Paris - Sub Code Culture [Euphonic]
07 John Grand - Regret [Progressive House Worldwide] TRACK OF THE MONTH
08 ilan Bluestone & Maor Levi ft EL Waves - Will We Remain (Spencer Brown Remix) [Anjunabeats ]
09 Eximinds & Ben Stone - Cassiopeia [AVA]
10 Kyau & Albert feat. Jeza - Make it Home Tonight (Suncatcher Remix) [Euphonic]
11 Craig Connelly - Phuket [Black Hole]
12 Exolight & Suncatcher - I'm Always Happy When It's Raining [Euphonic]
13 Paul van Dyk & Rafael Osmo -  Moments With You [VANDIT Records]
14 Haris C feat. Ion Blue - Never Let Go (Haris Cs Main Stage Remix) [Alter Ego]
15 Gabriel & Dresden feat. Jan Burton - You (Myon & Elevven Remix) [Anjunabeats]
16 Furkan Senol - Personal Way [Alter Ego Progressive]
17 Francesco Sambero - Transparencies [Elliptical Sun Melodies]
18 Noequalgods vs Tim Iron & Michael Mashkov - Zion [Elliptical Sun]
19 Matt Fax - Ignition [Enhanced Progressive]
20 Frahma - Under Every Shed Of Million Lights [Alter Ego Progressive]
21 Dezza - Firefly [Colorize]
22 Xinobi - Far Away Place (Rampa Remix) [Discotexas]
23 Luttrell - Quiet Even Dark [Anjunadeep]
24 Larsson (BE) - Wonderful [Euphonic Visions]
25 Tim Iron - Harbor [Emergent Textures]
26 Above & Beyond and Spencer Brown feat. RBBTS - Long Way From Home [Anjunabeats]
